feedback.text: It would be great if we could protect consumers from getting exploited by big game publishers. Right now you "buy a game" for 60 to 80 euro but you only get the "license to use", which first of all is falls advertising, and on the second, the publisher will just "take away" your "license to use" and deactivate there game if it´s not profitable for them anymore. no matter if the game requires "always online" or not. The eu needs to protect it´s people from getting exploited by greedy american consumer laws. thanks for you attention
